title: squid security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[7:6.10-6.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-122480 - CVE-2025-62168 squid: Squid vulnerable to information
  disclosure via authentication credential leakage in error handling

[7:6.10-6]
- Resolves: RHEL-86817 - "TCP connection to XX.XX.XX.XX/XXXX failed" message is
  output frequently on RHEL10
full_text:
[7:6.10-6.1]
- Resolves: RHEL-122480 - CVE-2025-62168 squid: Squid vulnerable to information
  disclosure via authentication credential leakage in error handling

[7:6.10-6]
- Resolves: RHEL-86817 - "TCP connection to XX.XX.XX.XX/XXXX failed" message is
  output frequently on RHEL10

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21002.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-62168.html
